evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 38 trades and $1497.9 with median hold under 5 minutes, but owns the -513.4 global worst MAE. The worst tail had ES-VWAP distance 26.69, pullback-from-high 9.25, rolling-high distance 14.25, weak RSI/ADX warnings, and missed the extended-VWAP rejection veto only because max-vwap-distance was 26.25.
name: Extended-VWAP Near-Miss Tail Repair
risk: The same extended-above-VWAP regime contains protected fast winners, so widening the veto too far can suppress real edge. This micro-nudge should be rejected if protected extended-VWAP winner retention falls below 95% or total net profit drops below 98% of run_029.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long or related pullback entries already matching the extended-VWAP rejection signature except for a slightly too-tight max ES-VWAP distance boundary.
validation_metric: Worst MAE improves from -513.4 toward <= -403, charm_pin_pullback_long retains >=90% PnL, protected extended-VWAP winner retention >=95%, total net profit >=98% of run_029, completed trades stay within 10%, and slow_12h remains 0.

evidence: The worst charm-pin tail reached meaningful profit only after about 80 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners generally resolve quickly; static config cannot directly express early post-entry progress.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a small tail sample and block clean high-extension winners unless validated against protected winner UTCS and out-of-sample days.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of run_029, and slow_12h = 0.
